rule: .oUAEg { font-family: Jomolhari, serif; font-weight: 400; line-height: 125%; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; color: rgb(49, 51, 50); font-size: 50px; letter-spacing: -3px; }
.oUAEg p { font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit; margin-bottom: 0px; }
.hupGUI { position: relative; min-height: 56rem; display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; }
.QEbJK { text-align: center; max-width: 50rem; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 3.4rem 16%; margin: 10rem 5rem; }
